relations.rationale: As táticas são alternativas condicionadas ao tipo de evento: participação em evento de terceiro versus promoção de evento próprio. Não há colisão semântica inevitável; prefer_more_specific seleciona pelo ownership do evento sem fundir os prompts.

explicit_prior_finding_resolution.P3-XA-007: Four Verbalizar exact-tactic dependencies converted to confirmed complements; accepted artifacts may come from prior_decision.
explicit_prior_finding_resolution.P3-XA-008: Two contradictory thought-leadership hypotheses consolidated into one confirmed symmetric complements relation.
explicit_prior_finding_resolution.P3-XA-009: Paid/attribution and cross-channel directions no longer create exact-tactic dependencies; valid specific pairs are complements.
explicit_prior_finding_resolution.P3-XA-012: Referral-versus-UGC alternative relation rejected with no replacement because the deliverables can coexist.

review_summary.abstract_capability_policy: All 11 candidates targeting non-unique capabilities were rejected as tactic relations; their owner boundaries remain in P2.

cardinality_notes.zero_tactics: A relation never creates a route node when no tactic is otherwise eligible; maturity, owner, evidence and prior-decision gates still apply.
cardinality_notes.one_tactic: A relation never forces a second tactic. An accepted prior_decision may satisfy the artifact need without executing another catalog tactic.
cardinality_notes.two_tactics: Confirmed complements, overlaps, alternatives and collisions only govern a pair already eligible for the same node; no relation overrides the hard maximum of two tactics.

review_summary.normative_effect: Only the 91 confirmed relations are normative. No proposed relation remains; rejected inputs emit no relation.
